## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve. e.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include any API designs or code examples if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you'd prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that might be helpful.
